description:
A Health Insurance Portability is nothing but the process through which you can transfer your current health insurance policy to another insurance provider of your choice.

What’s special about a health insurance portability is that you not only transfer to a better plan but your waiting periods and no claim bonus too.

WATCH OUR VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

comments.author: @divyanshkulshrestha8511

comments.text:
No claim bonus is not carried forward, however, continuity for NCB is carried forward if you opt for higher sum assured.

For eg- Old policy - 5 lacs, NCB 5 lacs, you are paying premium for 5 lacs here
New policy - 10 lacs - you will get continuity for 10 lacs ( 5 base+ 5 NCB)  , you will have to pay premium for 10 lacs
